genre_refs: WPA/mid-century American poster style; AI-generated illustration
description: Illustrated (AI-generated) poster in a mid-20th-century WPA style. It shows a young white man with combed blond hair, from the waist up in a buttoned blue-gray work shirt, hands at his hips, looking off to the side. Behind him is a large American flag (stars at upper left, red-and-white stripes and a sunset sky) and silhouettes of gantry cranes and shipyard or construction structures in muted teal and rust tones. The color palette is cream, teal, dusty red, and navy. Across the bottom in large bold white serif capitals is 'AMERICANS FIRST.' on two lines ('AMERICANS' over 'FIRST.'). The tweet reads 'rebuilding our workforce and ensuring American Jobs go to AMERICANS FIRST!'
